text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 82 

SPLMTL_SAREA 

LABEL: Annual Managed Care Plan Record in Supplemental Service Area File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there are one or more record(s) in the Service Area supplemental file for this 
managed care plan/entity (i.e., CCW_APL_LINK_KEY) . 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_SAREA 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_SAREA 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed
